final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing short-video vertical cover for a gaming monitor product launch, targeting tech/esports audiences on short-video platforms.

Style/medium: minimalist premium product cover, sleek tech aesthetic
Composition: rule-of-thirds layout; large bold headline text in upper or lower third, monitor hero shot in center third
Subject: GGU esports gaming monitor, emphasizing cutting-edge panel technology
Scene/backdrop: dark, deep background with subtle tech-grid or light-streak accents to convey high performance
Lighting/mood: dramatic accent lighting on the monitor, cool-to-neutral tones with sharp contrast to highlight premium feel
Color palette: deep black / dark navy base, with electric accent color (e.g., electric blue or white) for text and highlights
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, subtle metallic sheen on monitor bezel
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as the dominant headline in oversized bold type; "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as supporting subtitle
Constraints: vertical 9:16 format; headline must be visually dominant and eye-catching; rule-of-thirds composition strictly applied
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic gaming RGB rainbow aesthetic, small unreadable text, overly busy backgrounds
